title: Stacks, Queues, Deques, and Monotonic Structures · Counterexample Repair Bay
summary: Coordinate undo history, request scheduling, and sliding-window alerts. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a suite of bounded linear abstract data types and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define stack, queue, and deque behavior independently from implementation details.
Apply LIFO state to parsing, undo, traversal, and nested-delimiter validation.
Apply FIFO ordering with bounded capacity and explicit overload behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
